name: Chloe Trice
ai_summary: Chloe Trice is a 19-year-old with 1.5 years of childcare experience raising siblings and caring for family children. She's located in Conyers, GA, available part-time, and handles conflicts by separating children calmly and facilitating apologies to restore harmony.

transcripts.q3: Hi, my name is Chloe, tries. I am 19 years old and I have a year-and-a-half experience for children. Actually love working with kids because I basically raised my siblings. So I grew up with a lot of kids, cousins different, family members, watching their kids, so that has always made me want to go into like child care. Um, and yeah.
transcripts.q4: I am currently located in Conyers Georgia, ZIP code, 300 94,
transcripts.q5: I'm actually looking for part-time as of right now and I am available. Whatever days you guys would need me.
transcripts.q6: If two kids have conflict, like save one kid hit another, I would definitely come both children down. Ask them with happened between those two and I will ask them. Could they apologized to each other? Usually when it becomes them fighting there are already friends and like one kid just get frustrated, you know, it just gets frustrated each other. So usually He they'll just apologize and go back to doing literally what they were just doing.
transcripts.q7: I will make a great teacher for you guys because like I said before, I love kids, I've always dealt with kids, any age is fine with me and anytime I'm available, so yeah.
